01d : Right Hand Drive Steering
02d : Left Hand Drive Steering

01d : Without compressor
02d : With compressor (external ctrl with cluctch)

04d : With compressor (internal ctrl with cluctch)
05d : With compressor (fixed ctrl with cluctch)

OLB_IgnitionState.comment:
0h: Before ignition (off or AUTO ACC) (*)
0h: No MMI activation request (**)
1h: Ignition (*)
1h: Wake up MMI requested (**)

Notes:
(*): Definition related to OH_IgnitionState use.
(**): Definition related to OH_ClimMMIActivationRequest use.
